SEARCH
Package com.txstate.bloodhound.service

Class ValidationService

java.lang.Object
com.txstate.bloodhound.service.ValidationService
public class ValidationService extends Object
Applies range and logical validation rules for health records.

  • Method Details

    • validateRecord

      public ValidationResult validateRecord(HealthRecord record)
      Validates a record and returns all detected issues.
      Parameters:
      record - record to validate
      Returns:
      validation result containing zero or more errors
